title: Career Therapy | #shorts
full_text: We I'm the world's leading almost therapist. Whatever your problem is, I can solve it. Tell me what it is. Let's go. >> I've been on the road traveling doing shows and selling merch and her books. >> Mhm. >> At shows. >> Whose books? Your mom's book? >> Okay. So, your mom is creating a lot of opportunity for you. That's good. >> The issue is that because I've been on the road and at these airports and all over different cities in the US, I haven't been able to play as much basketball as I'd like to. >> That's a good thing, right? Because you're getting real life experience. You're helping your mom's business. You're making money. So what's the problem again? >> But at what cost? >> At what cost? You can bounce a ball in your hotel room. Nobody's stopping you. >> But I want to pursue my dreams. >> What's your dream? >> Playing basketball. >> How are you going to pay your bills when you grow up? >> I'll go to the NBA. >> Wait, you are an Indian boy. You are not going to be 6'5, 6'7, the type basketball players. Do you understand how valuable on top of it your brain is? It is the 1% of the 1% of the 1%. Your brain can do math that most people can't even comprehend. Why you going to waste your time? Dribble ball. Dribble ball. Any fool can do that. >> I can be the best fool of them all.
